original_title: SW-260 My classmate's panchira is right there. It's ugly, but a literary girl who comes to my house as a science boy to teach me how to study before the test. But soon I got bored and saw a panchira when I was taking a break on the bed and got an erection.
overview: It's ugly, but before the test, a liberal arts girl who is not good at math comes to my house as a science boy to teach me how to study. However, I soon get tired of it and start taking a break on the bed, so the skirt is turned over and the panchira is glancing! I can't stand the prep butt in front of me! The girl who finds an erotic book and begins to flutter seems to be worried about my crotch.
title: SW 260
